data.revised_prompt: Create a clean HD 2D game enemy concept illustration for a cultivation roguelite: a cute but hostile chibi melee enemy, a compact demonic armored foot soldier suitable as a common close-range unit in Samsara Ascension. Full body visible, centered, three-quarter RPG combat view, compact idle hostile stance, clear feet anchor, generous padding, subject occupies about 56% of the canvas. The character should have chibi proportions, a slightly oversized helmet, dark forged armor in charcoal black and muted steel, a short weapon or clenched gauntlets, one or two simple glowing blue crack marks, and a small torn cloth tabard. Keep the silhouette simple, readable, and compact, with reduced ornament complexity, not boss-like. Style should be clean hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG asset art, crisp silhouette, simplified details, readable hostile proportions, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Lighting should be cool with restrained electric-blue glow accents and subtle rim light for contrast. Use a perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key background only, with one uniform color and absolutely no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, or lighting variation in the background. No UI, no text, no watermark, no giant VFX, no huge cape, no cluttered silhouette, no comedy face, no gore, no realistic anatomy, no crown, no many floating ornaments.
